Qu Huang еұҲжҷғ
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Qu Huang (еұҲжҷғ). Bound himself and argued against Sun HeвҖҷs demotion, even when beaten. Exiled. Qu Huang was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom.
